title: allow WebSearch(bare・specifier なしが唯一の形)で事前承認 -> 検索が完遂

probes.prompt: First use only the WebSearch tool to run a web search for "example domain reserved documentation". If (and only if) the search returns results, then use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/01-permission/P10-webfetch-rules/f-websearch-allow/WS_MARKER.txt with the content 'SEARCHED'. If the WebSearch call is blocked or denied, do NOT write any file — just reply WS_BLOCKED. Use only the WebSearch and Write tools.
probes.result_text: Done. WebSearch was successful and returned results about reserved example domains. The file `WS_MARKER.txt` has been created with the content 'SEARCHED'.

hypothesis: WebSearch の許可は全か無か(ドメイン限定不可)。『限定的な web search』を規則で書く手段は無い=許可は信頼側の判断になる。絞りたければ WebFetch(domain allowlist=a〜d)に寄せてWebSearch は deny(g)する設計もある。
